description: Clean and process the job search dataset to compare competing compensation packages. The final comparison must include annual total compensation for each offer and documented follow-up requirements. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/job_search_analysis.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You're tracking a job search and have two competing offers. Clean up the messy spreadsheet data: convert hourly rates to annual salaries, calculate total compensation for Company A (TechStart Inc) and Company B (DataCorp), and add formulas to track days since application.
